name: animations
tagline: Reference for Phaser 4 sprite animation APIs: AnimationManager, AnimationState, spritesheets, atlases, and events.
verdict: Thorough, accurate animation API reference with clear examples and explicit priority rules (e.g. frameRate vs duration). No security concerns. The 482-line file is dense with several large inline reference tables, has no negative-trigger scope guidance, and carries no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion guidance anywhere, despite explicit related sibling skills (sprites-and-images, loading-assets) that could misfire.
482-line file inlines several exhaustive reference tables (Configuration Reference, Events, API Quick Reference) rather than splitting bulk material to on-demand references.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes found anywhere in the file.
